A. chamber
B. bin

[Output]
To determine if 2111159 is a prime number, we need to check if it has any divisors other than 1 and itself. Checking divisibility by smaller prime numbers up to its square root (approximately 1453), we find that 2111159 is divisible by 3 (since the sum of its digits, 2 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 5 + 9 = 20, is not divisible by 3). Therefore, 2111159 is not a prime number.
